summary: Pastebin application with text sharing functionality. Paste data resets between deployments are acceptable.
architectural_notes: Draft editor causing origin errors needs configuration or removal
Paste retrieval returning null despite valid remaining time - backend storage issue
Pastes can reset between deployments - no persistent storage required
known_issues: Draft editor script shows disallowed origin error for deployed domain
Backend returns null for newly created pastes even with valid paste ID

new_feature_requests.summary: Remove or suppress the draft editor origin error (disallowed origin: https://molecular-lavender-hsv-draft.caffeine.xyz) that appears in the console during paste operations
Fix the backend paste retrieval logic so that newly created pastes with valid IDs (e.g., 1771800332721583303) return the correct paste data instead of null
Verify that the paste ID format used during creation matches the format expected during retrieval, ensuring consistency between storage and lookup operations
